title: calc_ivr missing current_vix arg
root_cause: signature mismatch - calc_ivr(current_vix: float) requires arg but 17341 called without
root_cause_pattern: method signature change without updating all callers

title: get_ivr_percentiles returns tuple but caller uses .get()
root_cause: return type mismatch - get_ivr_percentiles returns tuple(ivr_low, ivr_high) but 17342 treats as dict
root_cause_pattern: return type documented in signature but caller assumes different type
detection_method: dry-test AttributeError: tuple has no attribute get

title: ChainGuard _cached_spy_price never assigned
root_cause: variable read via getattr fallback to 0 - no assignment anywhere in codebase - ChainGuard filter effectively disabled (Therac-25 pattern)
root_cause_pattern: SPY-hardcoded symbol reference when underlying_code may differ (multi-symbol era forgot center-price-getter update)
detection_method: Redteam agent aa60 static grep _cached_spy_price=0 hits

title: update_atm_subscribe uses SPY price for SPX underlying
root_cause: caller passes spy_price (SPY) but self.underlying_code can be SPX - ChainGuard judges SPX 7000-strike with SPY 714 center as all-out-of-range leading to 100% skip
root_cause_pattern: same as BUG-20260425-003 - symbol agnostic function accepts SPY-named arg
detection_method: dry-test log SPX ORB H=300.50 + ChainGuard skip full 100%

title: get_spy_current() returns SPY price for any underlying_code (16 sites)
root_cause: SPY-named getter used unchanged across 16 sites when multi-symbol era added but getter signature not updated to take symbol
detection_method: Explore agent a2123 grep + static analysis

title: ORBEngine._get_fallback_price silent 300.0 default for unknown symbol
root_cause: dict.get(symbol, 300.0) silent fallback masks missing entries - SPX strips to 'SPX' which is absent from _FALLBACK_PRICE_DEFAULTS -> 300.0 used as SPX price causing ORB H=300.50 L=299.50
root_cause_pattern: silent fallback with arbitrary magic number (300.0) - violates fail-fast principle
detection_method: dry-test live log 'SPX ORB: H=300.50 L=299.50' anomaly

title: bot_name 'orb_atlas' not in _KNOWN_BOTS
root_cause: ORB Atlas tactic uses bot_name='orb_atlas' but _KNOWN_BOTS=('spy_bot','momentum_bot','mffu_bot','apex_bot') - orb_atlas 未登録
root_cause_pattern: hardcoded known-list not updated when new bot_name added

title: Atlas v3 に paper 発注機能未移植
root_cause: ADR-014 Decision 3 通り atlas_v3 は read-only metrics のみ・発注は spy_bot.py (legacy) に残存・Atlas v3 単独では paper trading できない設計
root_cause_pattern: ADR で先送り宣言した機能が実運用要件化して混乱発生
detection_method: ゆうさくさん 2026-04-25 06:10 指摘 「Atlas bot だけだと思った」

title: AtlasTrader delegate pattern design flaw (Redteam 却下)
root_cause: spy_bot.SPYCreditSpreadBot を composition で wrap する設計は 8 攻撃面 (thread safety/logger汚染/env二重上書き/PID lock衝突/Engine hook幻想/launchd二重起動/エラー抑制/設計債務膨張) のうち 3 CRITICAL で不成立
tests_added: delegate 版 33 tests archive 済
root_cause_pattern: 既存 stateful module を wrapper で包む時の 5 大欠陥 (module-level副作用・rootLogger共有・instance state race・固定 PID lock path・内部 method 依存)
detection_method: redteam agent abf2420 事前攻撃
design_replaced_by: subprocess 境界分離 (atlas_v3/bots/ から spy_bot.py を subprocess 起動・delegate なし)
